subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would love to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability for a meeting:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know which slot suits you and we will set it up.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal contact information. Any senior-level discussions can be arranged through this channel once we have an initial alignment.

Thanks again for following up, and looking forward to meeting!

Best regards
